calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-22-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-01-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Linda S. Forster, #13286.

Michael Raifsnider, Esq. appeared with plaintiff James DeSoto, dba James DeSoto Bail Bonds, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by plaintiff Larry Shanahan, dba Peninsula Bonding & Insurance Services.
No appearance by defendant Jales Machado Valadao.
Default entered against defendant on April 1, 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed today, July 1, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs James DeSoto, dba James DeSoto Bail Bonds and Larry Shanahan, dba Peninsula Bonding & Insurance Services, and against the Defaulted Defendant Jales Machado Valadao as follows:

Damages/Principal - $20,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $7,996.00.
Attorney's Fees - $565.00.
Costs - $1,645.00, for a total of $30,206.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
